hero.profileRole: Software Engineering Student | Backend / Full Stack
hero.title: Software Developer in Training
hero.description: I build complete applications focused on backend, frontend, and databases, with emphasis on architecture, quality, and user experience.

about.title: About
about.summary:
I am a Software Engineering student with a strong interest in software development and a solid foundation in software engineering. I have built full projects working across backend, frontend, and databases, which has given me an end-to-end perspective on application development.

Beyond academic projects, I also build personal projects from ideas I consider useful or interesting. This allows me to experiment with new technologies, improve my technical skills, and apply software engineering concepts in practical contexts.

I enjoy designing robust and well-structured solutions, and I am especially interested in continuing to grow in cybersecurity and in using artificial intelligence as a support tool for software development, with a focus on improving productivity and exploring how far it can help create real solutions more efficiently.

items.name: Synapse
items.description: Full-stack application focused on turning scattered information into actionable knowledge: it allows capturing links, videos, text, and documents; processing them with local AI; organizing them into folders and tags; and exporting them as Markdown, JSON, or PDF. It includes a modular architecture, asynchronous processing workflow, and notification system for real productivity use cases.
responsibilities: Full-stack architecture with Spring Boot, React, and PostgreSQL
JWT authentication and secure REST APIs
Modular backend design with multiple functional modules
Ollama integration: asynchronous content processing with automatic retries and graceful fallback
Notification system and content processing workflow
Data export features in Markdown, JSON, and PDF
highlights: Robust and scalable Full Stack architecture with Java 17 + Spring Boot 3 + React 18
Modular backend with clear separation by functional domains
Local AI integration to enrich content without external dependencies
Capture and organization pipeline using folders and tags

items.name: E-commerce Store (.NET)
items.description: E-commerce web application built with C# and .NET using a layered architecture, designed to cover a realistic end-to-end online store flow: product catalog with subtypes and categories, filtered search, cart, checkout, and order management. The project was graded 10/10 by faculty staff.
responsibilities: Full Stack development (backend, frontend, and data model)
Design and implementation of a tag cloud system for comments
Collaborative work following a layered architecture
highlights: Authentication and authorization with roles, encrypted passwords, and Google login integration (OAuth 2.0)
Catalog management with product subtypes and categories, including text search and category filters
Complete purchase flow: session cart, checkout, order generation, and order history with line items and unit prices
Web 2.0 features: product comments, tagging, and tag cloud for better classification and retrieval
Automated integration tests for model-layer services and final grade of 10/10

items.name: Gym Workout App
items.description: Full Stack web application for managing and tracking gym routines, including user statistics and metric visualization.
responsibilities: Complete statistics system with multiple chart types (line, radar) and time filters
Implementation of equipment and muscle group management
Creation of the routine listing and visualization system
Preparation and loading of test data in the database for functional validation
Bug fixes and improvements in existing features
highlights: Complete statistics system with multiple chart types (line, radar) and time filters
Authentication and authorization using JWT and Spring Security
User management with a blocking system and coach tracking

items.description: Interest in designing and building robust, scalable, and well-structured applications, with special attention to architecture, business logic, and software quality.
Interest in web application security, including authentication, authorization, password hashing, and secure development best practices.
Practical and conscious use of AI tools to improve productivity, support solution design, generate tests, and improve code quality.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: I am open to junior opportunities, collaborations, and projects where I can contribute value from day one.

cv.aboutText: Software Engineering student with hands-on experience building full-stack applications end to end, from data model to frontend, with a strong focus on architecture and code quality. Beyond academic projects, I build personal projects to explore new technologies — currently focused on cybersecurity and AI applied to development. I am looking for software development internships where I can contribute and learn in a real professional environment.
